education.degree: Postgraduate Degree in Computer Science Engineering
Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science Engineering

activities.title: Multi-Agent Workflow Automation
activities.description: Set up a multi-agent workflow system using a cli app with multiple local and remote model providers. Agents collaborate on versatile tasks including building personal projects, designing and implementing automations, and analyzing and documenting existing solutions. Enabled faster delivery cycles while maintaining good to excellent output quality.

activities.title: Custom NAS with 3D-Printed Mini-ITX Case
activities.description: Handpicked and assembled a NAS around the Intel N150 SoC platform with 16GB DDR4 RAM, running TrueNAS. Designed a three-pool storage layout — an SSD-only fast pool, a high-capacity HDD pool for long-term storage, and a disposable HDD pool for container volumes and experiments. Built from a modular 3D-printed enclosure with dual 140mm fans for active cooling. Serves double duty as a backup target for home lab services.

activities.title: Home Lab Server with Proxmox and Infrastructure-as-Code
activities.description: Repurposed an old laptop into a Proxmox VE hypervisor to run personal workloads at zero cost. Provisioned LXC containers with Terraform and automated configuration with Ansible, hosting a DNS resolver (Pi-hole), a private VPN, a service dashboard (Dashy), and a platform for personal projects.

activities.title: Electric Bicycle Conversion
activities.description: Converted a standard bicycle frame into a high-performance electric bike using a 750W mid-drive motor, 20Ah frame-mounted battery, and color dashboard display. Sourced all components during COVID-19 lockdowns despite multi-month shipping delays on specialized tools, with careful attention to cable management and clean aesthetics.

activities.title: Virtual Laboratory for Educational Environments
activities.description: Co-authored and presented this research paper at the 11th International Conference on Remote Engineering and Virtual Instrumentation (REV2014).

activities.title: Microsoft PizzaNight Spring — 1st Place
activities.description: Won first place for developing an innovative Windows 8 Store game application.

activities.title: Information Systems Design Training
activities.description: Completed a training course in Information Systems Design at Vantagem+.

activities.title: ISELTech Conference Organization
activities.description: Served on the organizing committee for ISELTech, a technology conference at ISEL.

activities.title: Sustainable Development Workshop
activities.description: Attended the first Engineering for Sustainable Development workshop at ISEL, exploring the intersection of engineering and sustainability.

activities.title: CS253: Web Application Engineering
activities.description: Completed Udacity's web development course taught by Reddit co-founder Steve Huffman.

activities.title: CS271: Introduction to Artificial Intelligence
activities.description: Completed Udacity's AI course led by Sebastian Thrun and Peter Norvig.

experience.location: remotely from Portugal to multiple countries
experience.description: Lead backend developer and team lead for vehicle glass repair and replacement services operating across multiple countries. Design critical services in Go on a Kubernetes/AWS microservices stack. Guide architectural decisions, mentor team members, and support estimation while scaling the backend team from 3 to 7 engineers.
experience.extended_description: Serve as lead backend developer and team lead for Belron's vehicle glass repair operations, working across an international team that has grown from 3 to 7 backend engineers. Key technical responsibilities include designing RESTful APIs using OpenAPI specifications and implementing Go microservices with high availability and scalability. Drive architectural improvements through incremental refactoring and pragmatic design decisions. Lead estimation sessions, mentor developers, and foster a collaborative team environment — bridging technical execution with people leadership. Operate the stack on Kubernetes orchestrated on AWS, with PostgreSQL for persistent storage and Redis for caching and performance optimization.

experience.location: remotely from Portugal to the Netherlands
experience.description: Built new versions of existing microservices for an advertising storage platform with occasional peaks of 8k requests per second. Improved operational visibility across distributed services through distributed tracing and monitoring. Increased test coverage on critical business paths and code.
experience.extended_description: Rebuilt and modernized existing microservices within the advertising storage platform, with occasional peaks of 8k requests per second. Implemented distributed tracing to improve observability and reduce troubleshooting time across the distributed system. Increased test coverage on critical business paths, ensuring reliability of core processes. Built event-driven architectures using Kafka for real-time data processing and Redis for caching. Enhanced system reliability through circuit breakers, rate limiting, and structured error handling. Worked with AWS services and the HashiCorp stack (Nomad, Consul) for deployment and service discovery. Contributed to the monitoring strategy using Prometheus and Grafana for metrics visualization and alerting.

experience.company: Software Development Center (SDC) - Volkswagen Digital Solutions
experience.description: Built multiple products in the vehicle delivery ecosystem using micro frontends (React/TypeScript) backed by Kotlin and Go microservices. Delivered a real-time vehicle event streaming platform, a customer onboarding system, and a contract management interface. Participated in technical interviews and contributed to team hiring.
experience.extended_description: Developed multiple products for Volkswagen's vehicle delivery ecosystem. Designed and implemented a real-time vehicle event streaming platform processing thousands of daily events, a streamlined customer onboarding system, and an intuitive contract management interface. Worked across the stack: micro frontends with React and TypeScript on the frontend, Kotlin and Go microservices on the backend. Practiced eXtreme Programming (XP) methodology with daily or weekly pair rotations, working in a test-driven development fashion throughout.

experience.description: Contributed to a UX-driven peer-to-peer money transfer app focused on simplicity and privacy. Improved development quality through unit testing, code reviews, and CI/CD optimizations. Managed feature estimation and conducted technical interviews for the Android team.
experience.extended_description: Worked on a consumer-grade app that made money transfers as simple as possible while keeping all user details private between the two parties. Drove quality improvements across the Android team by introducing comprehensive unit testing, code review practices, and CI/CD pipeline optimizations. Architected features including real-time transaction notifications and streaming events. Mentored junior developers and collaborated with product and design to ensure an intuitive UX. Improved performance through dependency injection with Dagger2 and efficient image loading with Fresco.

experience.description: Advised the product team on technology stack strategy, architecture patterns, and implementation approach for a new product launch.
experience.extended_description: Evaluated technology options and architecture patterns, producing detailed recommendations for a scalable system with strong performance characteristics. Guided the team through build-vs-buy decisions and implementation trade-offs during early-stage product development.

experience.description: Improved team coding patterns and code quality while incrementally replacing legacy components of the Android app with cleaner, more maintainable alternatives. Championed the company-wide migration from Java to Kotlin and led internal knowledge-sharing initiatives on software engineering practices.
experience.extended_description: Focused on elevating the Android team's engineering standards by introducing Clean Architecture patterns and systematic code reviews. Gradually replaced legacy app components with modular, readable alternatives. Spearheaded the adoption of Kotlin across all Android projects and launched an internal knowledge-sharing program to foster a culture of continuous improvement.

experience.description: Developed a secure document sharing app with geofencing, time-limited access, and share limit controls, built on an ESB-like event-driven architecture using Otto.
experience.extended_description: Joined a team of 3 mobile developers and a project manager to build a secure document sharing Android app. Alongside another colleague, developed features such as geofencing-based access restrictions, time-limited document sharing, and share limit enforcement. Ensured the ESB-like architecture centered on Otto was consistently followed across all features.

experience.description: Developed three mobile products across Android and iOS: an internal carpooling solution, the Fnac Portugal 2.0 app (Xamarin/iOS), and the Farmácias Portuguesas native Android app with loyalty tracking and pharmacy locator features.
experience.extended_description: Transitioned from backend into mobile development to meet market needs. Built and released an internal carpooling app (Android) in a team of 5. Joined FNAC Portugal to develop the 2.0 app in Xamarin (iOS), ensuring native-level performance and UX despite the hybrid platform. Finally, led the end-to-end development of the Farmácias Portuguesas native Android app — from requirements gathering to App Store deployment.

experience.description: Developed backend components and system integrations for the SINCRO speed control system, in collaboration with the National Road Safety Authority (ANSR).
experience.extended_description: Worked on the SINCRO speed control system, developed in partnership with Portugal's National Road Safety Authority (ANSR). The system identified vehicles exceeding speed limits on public roads and delivered near real-time evidence to authorities. Contributed to extending an existing codebase with new features and improvements.

experience.company: Entigere S.A. (as a contractor from DoisBr)
experience.description: Development, implementation and support of an internal customer management system for Entigere.
experience.extended_description: Initial work was focused on the analysis and prototyping of a customer management system, based on the existing data, scattered across multiple Microsoft Excel spreadsheets. Due to the nature of the files containing the data and the technological landscape, the initial prototype was developed in Microsoft Office Access using VB6 to ingest, process and treat data. Further developments were made to provide ease of access to the developed data storage.

experience.company: Telecomunicações Móveis Nacionais (TMN, now part of Altice)
experience.description: Inbound customer support for mobile device configuration and assistance with company service-related inquiries.
experience.extended_description: Daily work included answering customer calls, providing technical support for mobile devices and assisting customers with service-related inquiries. Developed strong communication and problem-diagnosing skills while working in a fast-paced environment, and gained valuable experience in customer service.
